html:
2026-0163
2026-02-26HCControlled Drugs and Substances ActOrder Amending Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (Additional Fentanyl Precursors)Order Amending Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (Additional Fentanyl Precursors) in order to (1) add phenethyl bromide, phenethyl chloride, phenethyl iodide, and propionic anhydride to Part 1 of Schedule VI to the act as Class A precursors; and (2) add benzyl chloride to Part 2 of Schedule VI to the act as a Class B precursor.Registration: SOR/2026-0038 Publication Date: 2026-03-11
subject: Order Amending Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (Additional Fentanyl Precursors)
precis: Order Amending Schedule VI to the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (Additional Fentanyl Precursors) in order to (1) add phenethyl bromide, phenethyl chloride, phenethyl iodide, and propionic anhydride to Part 1 of Schedule VI to the act as Class A precursors; and (2) add benzyl chloride to Part 2 of Schedule VI to the act as a Class B precursor.
